meta.title: ICS Security: November Month In Review
meta.description: Patrick Miller joins me to discuss the top three stories of the month, plus wins, fails and predictions. One story I'm really interested in getting Patrick's thoughts on is the Water sector (AWWA) pointing at the NERC CIP structure as a model to follow.
